leadText: Peanut Butter (Japanese: ピーナッツバター Peanut Butter) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very sweet condiment. People in Paldea seem to favor the sweet varieties over the unsweetened.
